endpoints.name: GET /datasources
endpoints.description: Lists all datasources available for an Azure Search service.

endpoints.name: POST /datasources
endpoints.description: Creates a new Azure Search datasource.

endpoints.name: GET /datasources('{dataSourceName}')
endpoints.description: Retrieves a datasource definition from Azure Search.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DATASOURCENAME}} with a real datasourcename.

endpoints.name: PUT /datasources('{dataSourceName}')
endpoints.description: Creates a new Azure Search datasource or updates a datasource if it already exists.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DATASOURCENAME}} with a real datasourcename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /datasources('{dataSourceName}')
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DATASOURCENAME}} with a real datasourcename.

endpoints.name: GET /indexers
endpoints.description: Lists all indexers available for an Azure Search service.

endpoints.name: POST /indexers
endpoints.description: Creates a new Azure Search indexer.

endpoints.name: GET /indexers('{indexerName}')
endpoints.description: Retrieves an indexer definition from Azure Search.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{INDEXERNAME}} with a real indexername.

endpoints.name: PUT /indexers('{indexerName}')
endpoints.description: Creates a new Azure Search indexer or updates an indexer if it already exists.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{INDEXERNAME}} with a real indexername.

endpoints.name: DELETE /indexers('{indexerName}')
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{INDEXERNAME}} with a real indexername.

endpoints.name: POST /indexers('{indexerName}')/search.reset
endpoints.description: Resets the change tracking state associated with an Azure Search indexer.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{INDEXERNAME}} with a real indexername.

endpoints.name: POST /indexers('{indexerName}')/search.run
endpoints.description: Runs an Azure Search indexer on-demand.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{INDEXERNAME}} with a real indexername.

endpoints.name: GET /indexers('{indexerName}')/search.status
endpoints.description: Returns the current status and execution history of an indexer.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{INDEXERNAME}} with a real indexername.

endpoints.name: GET /indexes
endpoints.description: Lists all indexes available for an Azure Search service.

endpoints.name: POST /indexes
endpoints.description: Creates a new Azure Search index.

endpoints.name: GET /indexes('{indexName}')
endpoints.description: Retrieves an index definition from Azure Search.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{INDEXNAME}} with a real indexname.

endpoints.name: PUT /indexes('{indexName}')
endpoints.description: Creates a new Azure Search index or updates an index if it already exists.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{INDEXNAME}} with a real indexname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /indexes('{indexName}')
endpoints.description: Deletes an Azure Search index and all the documents it contains.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{INDEXNAME}} with a real indexname.

endpoints.name: GET /indexes('{indexName}')/search.stats
endpoints.description: Returns statistics for the given index, including a document count and storage usage.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{INDEXNAME}} with a real indexname.
